seven_day_forecast.name: Tonight
seven_day_forecast.detail: Tonight: Increasing clouds, with a low around 54. Calm wind becoming south around 5 mph.

seven_day_forecast.name: Saturday
seven_day_forecast.short_desc: Slight Chance Showers then Mostly Sunny
seven_day_forecast.detail: Saturday: A slight chance of showers between 11am and noon.  Mostly sunny, with a high near 77. South wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.  Chance of precipitation is 20%.

seven_day_forecast.name: Saturday Night
seven_day_forecast.detail: Saturday Night: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 59. Light southwest wind.

seven_day_forecast.name: Sunday
seven_day_forecast.detail: Sunday: Mostly sunny, with a high near 84. Calm wind becoming southwest around 5 mph in the afternoon.

seven_day_forecast.name: Sunday Night
seven_day_forecast.detail: Sunday Night: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 5am, then a chance of showers after 5am.  Partly cloudy, with a low around 62. Calm wind becoming south around 5 mph after midnight.  Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts of less than a tenth of an inch, except higher amounts possible in thunderstorms.

seven_day_forecast.name: Monday
seven_day_forecast.detail: Monday: Showers, with thunderstorms also possible after 11am.  High near 75. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch, except higher amounts possible in thunderstorms.

seven_day_forecast.name: Monday Night
seven_day_forecast.detail: Monday Night: Showers likely before 8pm.  Mostly cloudy, with a low around 49. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

seven_day_forecast.name: Tuesday

seven_day_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
